create.title: Create your first workspace
create.desc: A workspace is where your documents and projects live. You can rename it and change the address later.

errors.slug_invalid: The address must be 3–40 lowercase letters, digits, or hyphens.
errors.slug_reserved: That address is reserved. Pick another.
errors.slug_conflict: That address is already taken. Try one of the suggestions.
errors.network: Connection issue. Please try again in a moment.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

invite.title: {inviterName} invited you
invite.declineAndCreate: Or create your own workspace instead
invite.emailMismatchHint: This invite was sent to {inviteEmail}. Please sign in with that address.

errors.email_mismatch: The invited email does not match your signed-in address.
errors.expired: This invite has expired. Ask the sender to resend it.
errors.already_member: You are already a member of this workspace.
errors.not_found: We could not find this invite link.
errors.network: Connection issue. Please try again in a moment.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
